subcodes.first_line: Hath the verses been sent down? Say: Yea, by the Lord of the heavens! Hath the Hour come? Nay, it hath passed, and He Who is the Manifestation of clear signs hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هل الایات نزلت قل ای ورب السموات هل اتت الساعه بل قضت ومظهر البینات قد
subcodes.subjects: @apocalyptic imagery, @day of Resurrection; Judgement, @power of prayer, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell
